title: Xtra Crispy Peruvian Chicken Skillet
description: A hearty and flavorful Peruvian dish featuring crispy chicken legs, confit tomatoes, and a blend of Mediterranean spices, perfect for a sick day or a weeknight dinner. This recipe is made in a tava griddle for a crispy crust and a juicy interior.
instructions: Preheat the tava griddle over medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, paprika, cumin, salt, black pepper, and yeast.
Add the chicken legs to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Place the chicken legs on the preheated tava griddle and cook for 5 minutes on each side, or until crispy and golden brown.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and set aside.
Add the confit tomatoes to the tava griddle and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Return the chicken to the tava griddle and stir in lemon juice.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce is bubbly.
